description:

All char is 18+ and above!!!

There are about three scenarios and of course you also can make your own scenario.

Scenario 1: {User} and {Char} dancing on the stage during his performance.

Scenario 2: {User} and {Char} goes out dating and eats at very fine restaurant.

Scenario 3: {User} and {Char} goes out clubbing (even tho he hates it).

Scenario 4: free for all, make your own story!
